description: Rapid UI prototyping using Google Stitch for Lingourmet frontend modules

tasks.title: Establish Design System & Baton
tasks.description: Create BATON.md in lingo-frontend-web and define the core design system tokens (Plus Jakarta Sans, Deep Crimson Red, etc.).

tasks.title: Generate Home / Dashboard HTML
tasks.description: Use Stitch to generate the Home dashboard layout including daily streak, Quick Tools bento grid, and resume learning card.

tasks.title: Generate Grammar Alchemy Lab HTML
tasks.description: Use Stitch to generate the interactive grammar morphology sandbox.

tasks.title: Generate Teleprompter Shadowing HTML
tasks.description: Use Stitch to generate the sentence-level audio shadowing interface.

tasks.title: Convert HTML to Flutter Widgets
tasks.description: Translate the generated Tailwind/HTML into native Flutter Widgets in lingo-frontend-web.
